lead.titleZh: ACL重建后重返运动性别差异：系统综述揭示女性风险较高
lead.titleEn: ACL Reconstruction Return-to-Sport: Systematic Review Highlights Higher Risk for Females
lead.paragraphZh: 今日的 15 篇文章中，一篇运动康复领域的系统综述和荟萃分析得分最高（85 分），探讨了 ACL 重建后重返运动的性别差异，提示女性重返运动面临较高风险。另有两篇骨科和神经康复研究得分 80 分，分别关于 ACL 损伤与膝骨关节炎的关联以及卒中后上肢痉挛的干预，这些研究提供了重要的临床决策支持。
lead.paragraphEn: Among today's 15 articles, a systematic review and meta-analysis in sports rehabilitation scored highest (85), examining sex disparities in return to sport after ACL reconstruction and indicating a higher risk for females. Two other studies, scoring 80, covered the link between ACL injury and knee osteoarthritis and interventions for post-stroke upper limb spasticity, offering crucial insights for clinical practice.

items.title: Is Knee Osteoarthritis an Inevitable Consequence for Athletes after Anterior Cruciate Ligament Injury?
items.summary: This commentary argues that anterior cruciate ligament injury should be viewed as a long-term knee joint health condition potentially leading to post-traumatic knee osteoarthritis, despite advances in surgical reconstruction.
items.curatedReason: ACL损伤不仅是短期运动参与问题，更是长期膝关节健康的起点。要向患者明确解释ACL损伤导致创伤后骨关节炎（PTOA）的风险，并强调持续康复和生活方式管理的重要性，这比单纯关注重返运动更关键。
items.titleZh: 前交叉韧带损伤后膝骨关节炎是否不可避免？
items.summaryZh: 这篇评论文章认为，前交叉韧带（ACL）损伤不应仅被视为影响短期运动参与的急性创伤事件，而应被视为可能导致创伤后膝骨关节炎（PTOA）的长期膝关节健康问题的开端，尽管手术重建技术有所进步。
items.curatedReasonEn: ACL injury isn't just a short-term sports participation issue; it's the beginning of a long-term knee joint health condition. You must clearly explain the risk of post-traumatic osteoarthritis (PTOA) to patients and emphasize the importance of ongoing rehabilitation and lifestyle management, which is more critical than just focusing on return to sport.
items.journal: International journal of sports physical therapy

items.title: Phenomenological exploration of perceptions, experiences, facilitators, and inhibitors in patients with knee osteoarthritis during physiotherapy rehabilitation in a low- and middle-income country.
items.summary: A qualitative study explored perceptions, experiences, facilitators, and inhibitors of physiotherapy rehabilitation in knee osteoarthritis patients in a low- and middle-income country, highlighting the influence of lifestyle and contextual factors.
items.curatedReason: 这篇定性研究强调了在低收入国家膝骨关节炎康复中，患者视角和文化背景对依从性的影响。在临床实践中，这提示我们需要更深入地理解患者的个体差异和生活环境，超越单纯的生物医学模型。
items.titleZh: 低收入国家膝骨关节炎患者物理治疗康复中的感知、经验、促进与抑制因素现象学探索
items.summaryZh: 一项定性研究探索了低收入国家膝骨关节炎患者对物理治疗康复的感知、经验、促进因素和抑制因素，强调了生活方式和背景因素的影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: This qualitative study highlights how patient perspectives and cultural context influence adherence to KOA rehabilitation in low-income countries. Clinically, this suggests moving beyond a purely biomedical model to deeply understand individual patient differences and living environments.
items.limitation: 研究对象仅限于低收入国家，其结果在经济文化背景不同的地区外推性受限。
items.limitationEn: The study's findings, derived solely from a low-income country context, have limited generalizability to regions with different socioeconomic and cultural backgrounds.

items.title: Developing consensus on competency-based educational standards in orthopaedic manual physical therapy fellowship training: part 2: knowledge for specialty practice and professionalism.
items.summary: This study is part of an effort to develop consensus on competency-based educational standards for Orthopaedic Manual Physical Therapy (OMPT) fellowship training, focusing on knowledge for specialty practice and professionalism.
items.curatedReason: 随着OMPT（骨科手法物理治疗）专科培训的细化，此研究为建立OMPT高级人才的知识、技能和专业标准提供了框架。这有助于提升专科教育质量和临床实践的一致性，你可以此对照检查自身能力提升方向。
items.titleZh: 骨科手法物理治疗专科进修培训能力标准共识的制定：第二部分：专科实践知识与职业素养
items.summaryZh: 本研究旨在为骨科手法物理治疗（OMPT）专科进修培训制定能力导向的教育标准共识，重点关注专科实践所需的知识和职业素养。
items.curatedReasonEn: As OMPT (Orthopaedic Manual Physical Therapy) specialization evolves, this study provides a framework for establishing knowledge, skills, and professionalism standards for advanced OMPT practitioners. This helps enhance the quality and consistency of specialty education and clinical practice; you can use this to benchmark your own professional development.
items.journal: The Journal of manual & manipulative therapy

items.title: Accuracy of visual estimation of shoulder abduction by expert physiotherapists: a comparative study using 3D motion capture.
items.summary: A comparative study found that expert physiotherapists' visual estimation of shoulder abduction, even with video assistance, showed only moderate to good agreement (ICC 0.70-0.84) with 3D motion capture, suggesting potential inaccuracies in clinical practice.
items.curatedReason: 专家在视频辅助下对肩关节外展角度的目测准确性只有中度到良好水平 (ICC 0.70-0.84)。这意味着日常临床中仅凭目测可能高估或低估患者 ROM。
items.titleZh: 专家物理治疗师目测肩关节外展角度的准确性：一项使用 3D 运动捕捉的比较研究
items.summaryZh: 一项比较研究发现，即使有视频辅助，专家物理治疗师对肩关节外展的目测准确性与 3D 运动捕捉的一致性仅为中度至良好 (ICC 0.70-0.84)，提示临床实践中可能存在不准确性。
items.curatedReasonEn: Expert visual estimation of shoulder abduction range of motion, even with video assistance, shows only moderate to good agreement (ICC 0.70-0.84) with 3D motion capture. This implies that relying solely on visual estimation in daily practice might lead to over- or underestimation of patient ROM.
items.limitation: 研究仅评估了肩关节外展一个平面的 ROM 目测准确性，且未探究不同经验水平理疗师的差异。
items.limitationEn: The study only assessed visual estimation accuracy for shoulder abduction in one plane and did not explore differences among physiotherapists with varying experience levels.

items.title: Rehabilitation Utilizing Blood Flow Restriction Following Surgical Repair of a Bankart Lesion with a Buford Complex in an Elite High School Football Player: A Case Report.
items.summary: This case report details the rehabilitation of an elite high school football player after Bankart lesion repair with a Buford complex, utilizing blood flow restriction to address limited evidence in this combined pathology.
items.curatedReason: 对于合并Buford复合体并接受Bankart修复的精英运动员，本病例报告提供了结合血流限制训练的早期康复经验。在缺乏高证据级别指南的情况下，此案例可作为定制化康复方案的参考。
items.titleZh: 精英高中橄榄球运动员Bankart损伤合并Buford复合体修复术后采用血流限制康复的病例报告
items.summaryZh: 本病例报告详细介绍了精英高中橄榄球运动员Bankart损伤合并Buford复合体修复术后的康复过程，通过血流限制（BFR）训练应对了此复杂病理在术后康复证据上的局限。
items.curatedReasonEn: For elite athletes with a Buford complex undergoing Bankart repair, this case report provides insights into early rehabilitation incorporating blood flow restriction training. In the absence of high-level evidence guidelines, this case can serve as a reference for tailoring rehabilitation protocols.
items.limitation: 本研究为单病例报告，其发现的普适性极低。
items.limitationEn: This is a single case report, and its findings have extremely limited generalizability.
items.journal: International journal of sports physical therapy

items.title: Efficacy of repetitive transcranial magnetic stimulation combined with soft robotic glove training for slight-to-moderate post-stroke upper limb spasticity: a randomized controlled trial.
items.summary: 一项随机对照试验（N=54）显示，重复经颅磁刺激（rTMS）联合软性机器人手套训练能改善轻中度卒中后上肢痉挛患者的腕屈肌痉挛和上肢运动功能。
items.curatedReason: rTMS联合软性机器人手套训练对卒中后上肢痉挛的改善效果显著。对于有轻中度上肢痉挛的卒中患者，这提供了一个有潜力的新型联合干预方案，值得你考虑引入临床。
items.titleZh: 重复经颅磁刺激联合软性机器人手套训练治疗轻中度卒中后上肢痉挛的疗效：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项涵盖54例患者的随机对照试验表明，重复经颅磁刺激（rTMS）与软性机器人手套训练相结合，能有效改善轻中度卒中后上肢痉挛患者的腕屈肌痉挛和上肢运动功能。
items.curatedReasonEn: rTMS combined with soft robotic glove training shows significant improvement for post-stroke upper limb spasticity. For stroke patients with mild-to-moderate upper limb spasticity, this offers a promising new combined intervention, which you should consider for clinical integration.
items.limitation: 样本量相对较小（54例），需要更大规模的研究进一步验证其长期效果和适用人群。
items.limitationEn: The sample size is relatively small (54 patients), and larger studies are needed to further validate long-term effects and applicable populations.

items.title: Crossroads in Spinal Cord Injury Treatment: A Multidisciplinary Conference at a Pivotal Moment.
items.summary: This narrative summarizes key themes and discussions from the "Crossroads in Spinal Cord Injury Treatment" conference, which brought together multidisciplinary experts to examine future directions in SCI care and research.
items.curatedReason: 此次多学科会议的总结强调了脊髓损伤治疗的未来方向。作为临床医生，关注这些前沿主题有助于你了解和整合最新的治疗理念与研究进展，提前布局潜在的新技术和协作模式。
items.titleZh: 脊髓损伤治疗的十字路口：关键时刻的多学科会议
items.summaryZh: 这篇综述总结了“脊髓损伤治疗的十字路口”会议的关键主题和讨论，此次会议汇集了多学科专家，旨在探讨脊髓损伤（SCI）护理和研究的未来方向。
items.curatedReasonEn: This multidisciplinary conference summary highlights future directions in spinal cord injury treatment. As a clinician, staying abreast of these cutting-edge topics helps you understand and integrate the latest therapeutic concepts and research advancements, proactively positioning for potential new technologies and collaborative models.
items.journal: American journal of physical medicine & rehabilitation

items.title: Rehabilitation and Quality of Life for Aging People Living With HIV: Addressing Multimorbidity and Stigma.
items.summary: 一篇视点文章指出，随着HIV感染者寿命延长，老龄化HIV感染者的康复需求日益增加，涉及多重合并症和病耻感。
items.curatedReason: 随着HIV感染者老龄化，其康复需求日益凸显，且涉及多重合并症和病耻感。作为物理治疗师，你需要关注这类人群的特殊需求，特别是老年康复策略与心理社会支持的整合。
items.titleZh: HIV感染者老龄化群体的康复与生活质量：应对多重合并症与病耻感
items.summaryZh: 一篇视点文章强调，随着抗逆转录病毒疗法的普及，HIV已转变为慢性病，导致感染者老龄化。到2030年，预计70%的HIV感染者将超过50岁，这带来了多重合并症和病耻感等新的康复挑战。
items.curatedReasonEn: As the HIV population ages, their rehabilitation needs, complicated by multimorbidity and stigma, are becoming more prominent. As a physical therapist, you need to be aware of the specific needs of this population, especially regarding the integration of geriatric rehabilitation strategies and psychosocial support.
items.journal: American journal of physical medicine & rehabilitation

items.title: Phase-specific analysis of 180° turning gait in post-stroke hemiplegia.
items.summary: This study analyzed 180° turning gait in post-stroke hemiplegia patients across approach, turning, and departure phases to reveal detailed characteristics.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究对卒中偏瘫患者180°转身步态进行了分阶段分析，揭示了转身过程中不同阶段的详细特征。这些数据能让你更精细地评估患者的转身功能障碍，从而设计更具针对性的神经康复训练方案。
items.titleZh: 卒中偏瘫患者180°转身步态的分阶段分析
items.summaryZh: 本研究对卒中偏瘫患者180°转身步态进行了分阶段分析，以揭示其在接近、转身和离开阶段的详细特征。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study conducted a phase-specific analysis of 180° turning gait in post-stroke hemiplegia patients, revealing detailed characteristics of different turning phases. This data will enable you to more precisely evaluate patients' turning functional deficits and design more targeted neurological rehabilitation training programs.
items.limitation: 研究仅限于180°转身，可能无法完全代表日常生活中的其他复杂转身动作。
items.limitationEn: The study is limited to 180° turns and may not fully represent other complex turning movements in daily life.

items.title: Are There Sex Disparities in Return to Sport After Anterior Cruciate Ligament Reconstruction? A Systematic Review and Exploratory Meta-analysis.
items.summary: A systematic review and exploratory meta-analysis investigate sex disparities in return-to-sport outcomes after anterior cruciate ligament reconstruction, finding that female athletes may exhibit lower RTS rates despite higher injury rates.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述和荟萃分析强调了ACL重建后重返运动（RTS）在性别方面的差异，女性RTS率可能低于男性。你在评估女性患者RTS时需要特别关注其潜在的生理、心理和生物力学风险因素，并制定更个性化的策略。
items.titleZh: 前交叉韧带重建后重返运动是否存在性别差异？一项系统综述和探索性荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述和探索性荟萃分析旨在比较前交叉韧带重建（ACLR）后男性和女性患者的重返运动（RTS）结局，发现女性运动员的ACL损伤率可能高于男性，但RTS率可能较低。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review and meta-analysis highlight sex disparities in return-to-sport (RTS) rates after ACL reconstruction, with women potentially having lower RTS rates than men. When evaluating female patients for RTS, you need to pay particular attention to their potential physiological, psychological, and biomechanical risk factors and develop more individualized strategies.
items.limitation: 由于原始研究间的异质性，探索性荟萃分析的结果需谨慎解读。
items.limitationEn: Due to heterogeneity among original studies, the results of the exploratory meta-analysis should be interpreted with caution.
items.journal: The American journal of sports medicine

items.title: Rehabilitation Protocols Following Patellar Instability Surgery: A Structured Review of Published Recommendations and AI Generated Guidance.
items.summary: This structured review examines postoperative rehabilitation protocols for patellar instability surgery, comparing published recommendations with guidance generated by artificial intelligence platforms.
items.curatedReason: 此研究系统性地审查了髌骨不稳手术后的康复方案，并首次与AI生成的指南进行比较。在制定术后康复计划时，你可以参考其总结的专家共识，并审慎地将AI作为辅助工具。
items.titleZh: 髌骨不稳手术后康复方案：已发表建议和AI生成指南的结构化综述
items.summaryZh: 这项结构化综述评估了髌骨不稳手术（包括MPFL重建、胫骨结节截骨术等）后的康复方案，并首次将已发表的建议与人工智能（AI）平台生成的指南进行了比较。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study systematically reviewed rehabilitation protocols following patellar instability surgery and, for the first time, compared them with AI-generated guidance. When developing postoperative rehabilitation plans, you can refer to the expert consensus summarized here and judiciously use AI as an auxiliary tool.

items.title: Association between Patellofemoral Conditions and the Incidence of ACL Injury: Could Patellofemoral Conditions be a Risk Factor for ACL Injury? A 10-year Population-Based Study.
items.summary: A 10-year population-based study investigated the association between patellofemoral conditions and the incidence of ACL injury, suggesting that patellofemoral conditions might be a risk factor.
items.curatedReason: 这项十年期的基于人群研究提示，髌股关节疾病可能是ACL损伤的一个独立风险因素。这要求你在评估患者ACL损伤风险时，要将髌股关节病史纳入考量，并早期干预髌股关节功能障碍。
items.titleZh: 髌股关节疾病与ACL损伤发生率的关联：髌股关节疾病可能是ACL损伤的风险因素吗？一项10年基于人群的研究
items.summaryZh: 一项为期10年的基于人群的研究调查了髌股关节疾病与前交叉韧带（ACL）损伤发生率之间的关联，提示髌股关节疾病可能是一个ACL损伤的风险因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: This 10-year population-based study suggests that patellofemoral conditions may be an independent risk factor for ACL injury. This requires you to consider a history of patellofemoral conditions when assessing a patient's ACL injury risk and to intervene early for patellofemoral dysfunction.
items.limitation: 本研究为观察性研究，不能确立因果关系。
items.limitationEn: This is an observational study and cannot establish causality.
items.journal: International journal of sports physical therapy

items.title: Between the Snap and the Return: A Prospective Narrative Analysis of Four Voices from inside Anterior Cruciate Ligament Reconstruction Recovery.
items.summary: A prospective narrative analysis explored four patients' evolving experiences throughout anterior cruciate ligament reconstruction recovery.
items.curatedReason: 这项前瞻性叙事分析深入探讨了四位患者在ACL重建术后康复过程中的经验，弥补了横断面研究的不足。这能够帮助你更全面地理解ACL患者在不同康复阶段的心理和生理变化，从而提供更具个体化和情感支持的康复干预。
items.titleZh: 从发球到回击之间：前交叉韧带重建术后康复中四位患者的前瞻性叙事分析
items.summaryZh: 本研究通过前瞻性叙事分析，探索了四位患者在前交叉韧带（ACL）重建术后康复过程中不断变化的体验。
items.curatedReasonEn: This prospective narrative analysis delves into the experiences of four patients during ACL reconstruction recovery, complementing the limitations of cross-sectional studies. This can help you more comprehensively understand the psychological and physiological changes in ACL patients at different rehabilitation stages, thereby providing more individualized and emotionally supportive rehabilitation interventions.
items.limitation: 本研究为叙事分析，样本量较小（4位患者），结果的普遍性有限。
items.limitationEn: This is a narrative analysis with a small sample size (4 patients), limiting the generalizability of its findings.

items.title: Effect of home-based rehabilitation in frail older adults after cardiac surgery: a prospective feasibility study.
items.summary: A prospective feasibility study evaluated the effect of Vivifrail, a structured home-based multicomponent exercise program, in 40 frail older adults after cardiac surgery, finding it safe and beneficial for enhancing physical performance.
items.curatedReason: 这项可行性研究提示，针对接受心脏手术的虚弱老年人进行居家康复，特别是Vivifrail等多成分运动项目，是安全且有益的。在实践中，你可以考虑将这类结构化居家方案整合到老年心脏术后患者的康复路径中。
items.titleZh: 心脏手术后虚弱老年人居家康复效果的前瞻性可行性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项前瞻性可行性研究评估了Vivifrail——一项结构化的多成分居家运动项目——在40名心脏手术后虚弱老年人中的效果，发现其对于提高身体表现安全且有益。
items.curatedReasonEn: This feasibility study suggests that home-based rehabilitation, especially multicomponent exercise programs like Vivifrail, is safe and beneficial for frail older adults after cardiac surgery. In practice, you might consider integrating such structured home programs into the rehabilitation pathway for elderly post-cardiac surgery patients.
items.limitation: 这是一项单中心、非干预性、前瞻性可行性研究，样本量小（40人），结果普适性有限。
items.limitationEn: This is a single-center, non-interventional, prospective feasibility study with a small sample size (40 participants), limiting the generalizability of its findings.

items.title: Influence of environmental barriers and facilitators on functioning: Analytical observational study in community-dwelling older adults.
items.summary: This cross-sectional observational study analyzed the influence of environmental barriers and facilitators on the functioning of community-dwelling older adults using standardized quantitative instruments.
items.curatedReason: 本研究量化了环境因素对社区老年人功能表现的影响。你在评估和制定老年患者康复计划时，应主动识别和解决环境障碍，并利用环境促进因素，以优化他们的社会参与度和独立性。
items.titleZh: 环境障碍和促进因素对功能的影响：社区居住老年人分析性观察研究
items.summaryZh: 这项横断面观察性研究利用标准化量化工具，分析了环境障碍和促进因素对社区居住老年人功能表现的影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study quantifies the influence of environmental factors on the functional performance of community-dwelling older adults. When assessing and developing rehabilitation plans for elderly patients, you should actively identify and address environmental barriers and leverage environmental facilitators to optimize their social participation and independence.
items.limitation: 本研究为横断面研究，无法建立环境因素与功能表现之间的因果关系。
items.limitationEn: This is a cross-sectional study, so it cannot establish a causal relationship between environmental factors and functional performance.
